# Handmade Pasta Florence

> Hands-on fresh-pasta cooking classes in Florence, Italy — in person in the Oltrarno
> neighbourhood and live online with an ingredient kit shipped to your door.
> Small groups (max 8), run by two young Italians who grew up in Tuscan agriturismi.
> Newly opened in 2026.

## Classes
- The Nonna Table — 3 hours, four pasta shapes, max 8 guests, Oltrarno kitchen — €95/person
- Mercato & Mani — 5 hours, Sant'Ambrogio market walk + cook, max 6 guests — €145/person
- The Family Long-Table — private events (birthdays, proposals, reunions), 6–14 guests — from €680
- Live Online — cook from anywhere, fresh-pasta ingredient kit shipped to your door — from €68/person

## Good to know
- Location: Oltrarno, near Piazza Santo Spirito, Florence (Firenze), Italy
- Class times: 10:00, 14:30 and 18:00 (Florence / Europe-Rome time); closed Mondays
- Every class ends with a sit-down lunch of the pasta you made, plus a glass of local wine
- Gluten-free and allergy-friendly options available at no extra charge
- Booking: via WhatsApp (+39 344 5204379) or email ciao@handmadepastaflorence.com

## Links
- Home: https://handmadepastaflorence.com/
